rows.label: xs33650100_MSG0020
rows.name: Eh? Me? Yeah, I'm fine, totally fine.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33650100_MSG0030
rows.name:
I had a flare, so I sent it
up and waited for rescue.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33650100_MSG0040
rows.name:
My precious Doll flew off somewhere,
so I was just a little troubled.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33650100_MSG0050
rows.name:
If I'd known this would happen, maybe I
should've installed an auto-return mode.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33650100_MSG0060
rows.name:
[ST:wide ]—Wait, this is no time to talk about that.
It won't matter if we can't get back.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33650100_MSG0070
rows.name: Let's win properly and all go back together![ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33650100_MSG0080
rows.name:
Ah, but can I at least
record our battle data?[ST:wait ]
